arts.ttl: Burnley vs Leeds Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Form Guide
arts.sum: There is a top of the table showdown in the Championship this evening as Burnley welcome Leeds to Turf Moor. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted lin...

arts.ttl: First start since October? Leeds United might have to consider throwing 24-y/o into XI tonight
arts.sum: This season, Leeds have struggled away from home much more than they have at Elland Road, and a reason for that has been their long-term injuries for Ilia Gruev and Ethan Ampadu. Leeds United travel to Burnley this evening knowing that a win for either would be a massive boost in their hopes to secure promotion this season.

arts.ttl: Firpo starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Burnley
arts.sum: The latest Leeds United team news as Daniel Farke's side gear up to face Burnley in the Championship. The post Firpo starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Burnley appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds transfer move shines spotlight on gamble as season-defining moment arrives
arts.sum: Monday night games at home to Sunderland and then away at Sheffield United end the month, and with West Bromwich Albion at Elland Road on March 1st, Leeds will know their toughest run of Championship games will be behind them. A win at Turf Moor against third-placed Burnley will send the Whites our points clear of Sheffield United in second place and six points ahead of Scott Parker's Clarets in the race for promotion.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke backup transfer surely checked this week as Leeds United’s ideal target looks ruled out
arts.sum: Leeds United would no doubt love to sign Emi Buendia on loan from Aston Villa this month, but such is the quality of the Argentine that he’s attracting strong interest from Xabi Alonso’s Bayer Leverkusen. Heading into the window, Leeds were well aware that they weren’t the most favourable destination for Emi Buendia, after the Aston Villa playmaker made it clear in the summer that he wasn’t willing to drop into the Championship again despite his Norwich City connection with Farke.

arts.ttl: Burnley boss Scott Parker has no intention of playing down significance of Leeds United clash
arts.sum: Scott Parker has no intention of playing down the significance of Burnley’s top-of-the-table clash against Leeds United.

arts.ttl: Archie Gray Tottenham struggle hits new low after Leeds United transfer with shocking defeat
arts.sum: Former Leeds United star Archie Gray has been handed another disappointment with Tottenham as they suffered defeat to strugglers Leicester City. "I don’t speak about other players who are under contract at other clubs," Farke said.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke explains ‘complicated’ Leeds United game plan vs Burnley amid Ao Tanaka role
arts.sum: Farke says he expects a similar game at Turf Moor and, having already called for his attackers to be clinical, he also encouraged his team to remain patient. Daniel Farke says his players must be "patient" and not force attacking matters against Burnley tonight, hailing the defensive work of Scott Parker’s side.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Burnley with two players ruled out
arts.sum: But Whites boss Daniel Farke accepts his team will have to be at their best to pick up a positive result away at third-placed Burnley. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community
